headline: What Could Push JNJ Stock Higher From Here?
summary: While the market fixates on the STELARA patent cliff, the rest of the business is quietly accelerating. Excluding the legacy drug, Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) grew in double digits for the quarter. The Innovative Medicine segment absorbed a massive 920 basis point headwind from STELARA, yet still posted 7.4% growth. This is not a company treading water, but a portfolio already hitting its next stride.

headline: Eli Lilly’s Abridge Bet Links Healthcare AI To Valuation And Growth
summary: Eli Lilly (NYSE:LLY) has invested in Abridge, an AI-focused clinician documentation company. The partnership connects Lilly to Abridge's clinical conversation data platform, used across hundreds of health systems. The deal is aimed at using AI tools to speed up drug development, clinical trial enrollment, and evidence-based research. Eli Lilly is widely followed for its pharmaceutical portfolio, including obesity treatments and other therapies that have driven much of the recent discussion...

headline: Eli Lilly Stock Hits Buy Zone As Earnings Soar 156%. Funds Are Loading Up.
summary: With the massive SpaceX debut hogging the headlines, some retail investors may have allowed more prosaic names to slip from their minds.  Pharma stock Eli Lilly is trading in a buy zone as institutional investors load up.  Eli Lilly is committed to innovation and reinvests 20%-25% of its sales back into developing new treatments.
